case_title: MARGARITA LARA VS. TOMOMI INOUE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION.
